name: otto-agent-cli
description: The first multimodal, multi-model AI coding agent for your terminal — pair Claude + Codex on every turn and take the same session to WhatsApp or Telegram. Local-first and open source.
author: Pedro Morais

scripts.build: bun run build:cli && bun run build:tui && bun run gen:plugins
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/bundle --target bun --minify --keep-names --sourcemap=linked --external ink --external react --external '@anthropic-ai/*' --external openai --external '@google/*' --external nats --external '@elevenlabs/*'
scripts.build:tui: bun build src/tui/index.tsx --outdir dist/tui --target bun --keep-names --sourcemap=linked --external '@opentui/core' --external '@opentui/react' --external react --external nats
scripts.test: bun test src/bash/ src/hooks/ src/router/ src/heartbeat/ src/permissions/ src/triggers/ src/omni/ src/plugins/ src/adapters/ src/approval/ src/tui/hooks/runtime-feed.test.ts src/tui/hooks/runtime-display.test.ts src/tui/lib/group-timeline.test.ts src/tui/lib/input-layout.test.ts src/tui/lib/recent-sessions.test.ts src/tui/lib/status-meter.test.ts src/gateway-typing.test.ts && bun test src/tasks/ src/projects/ src/workflow-substrate/ src/whatsapp-overlay/ && bun run test:cli-commands && bun test src/bot.runtime-guards.test.ts && bun test src/remote-spawn-nats.test.ts && bun test src/runtime/index.test.ts src/runtime/model-catalog.test.ts && bun test src/runtime/context-registry.test.ts && bun test src/cli/context.test.ts src/cli/logging.test.ts src/cli/tui-launcher.test.ts src/cli/auto-launch.test.ts src/cli/skill-gates.test.ts && bun test src/utils/logger.test.ts && bun test src/transcripts.test.ts && bun test src/repl/ src/fusion/ && bun run test:sdk
scripts.test:sdk: bun test src/sdk/client-codegen/ ./tests/integration/sdk-roundtrip.test.ts ./packages/otto-os-sdk/src/__tests__/types.test-d.ts ./packages/otto-os-sdk/src/__tests__/streaming.test.ts && bun run sdk:check
scripts.test:cli-commands: for f in src/cli/commands/*.test.ts; do bun test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:live: OTTO_LIVE_TESTS=1 bun test src/runtime/*.live.test.ts && OTTO_LIVE_TESTS=1 bun test src/bot.live.test.ts
scripts.docs:openapi: bun src/cli/index.ts sdk openapi emit --out docs/openapi.json
scripts.check:docs: bun run lint:docs && bun run docs:check-links
